creator: caelian@gmail.com
text:
Moin,

After manually applying the patch provided in the PR to my ports-tree
the build bails out during the final linking stage of murmurd.
The cause of the linking problem seems to be a missing
-fstack-protector in src/murmur/Makefile.Debug LFLAGS specification.
After adding -fstack-protector there the build completed as expected.

With kind regards,
  Pascal Hofstee
